arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted XI to face Newcastle as Ruben Amorim makes three changes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim knows he must build up some morale at Manchester United with games against Liverpool and Arsenal coming up after the visit of in-form Newcastle, as he looks to end a run of three straight defeats

arts.ttl: Why Jason Tindall is missing from Newcastle United dugout at Man United tonight
arts.sum: There will be an unusual look to the Newcastle United bench at Old Trafford this evening - and Eddie Howe will be hoping it doesn't affect his side's performance against Manchester United. While Howe and Tindall are a familiar sight when the TV cameras focus on the Newcastle bench, the United head coach will not be short of support and advice this evening.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stars set for tearful exits in 2025 with contracts up and veteran eyes new deal
arts.sum: He last signed a contract on January 8 this year so there is every chance a new deal is waiting to be triggered for the ex-Switzerland international. One soon to be expired contract that is currently under the microscope has to be Martin Dubravka's deal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Man United – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United make the trip to Manchester United on Monday evening looking to continue their promising run of form. Eddie Howe’s side are searching for a fifth consecutive win in all competitions. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford exit confirmed as wish granted - Man Utd's perfect January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to enter their first transfer window with Ruben Amorim in charge and their first since sporting director Dan Ashworth's Old Trafford exit

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim is about to get the Manchester United luxury he has been waiting for
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim will be glad to see the back of a chaotic December when his side faces Newcastle United on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Six moves Man Utd should make in the 2025 January transfer window: Sell Marcus Rashford, lock down Amad Diallo's future and find a new left-back
arts.sum: Despite spending around £600 million ($752m) on new players in the last three summers and having one of the biggest wage bills in Europe, United somehow have a squad that is barely fit for purpose, especially not one that chimes with Ruben Amorim's vision for the team. Here's what the Red Devils should do when the window opens to give Ruben Amorim the best chance of getting the team back on track

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Newcastle United: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without club captain Bruno Fernandes who will serve his one game suspension.

The Red Devils were out-fought again on Boxing Day as they succumbed to defeat at Wolverhampton Wanderers.
